nodes.name: Cron — Monday 7 AM
nodes.notes: Every Monday 7 AM — generates weekly scorecard from Zoho + Xero data.

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS deals_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS pipeline_total FROM zoho_deals WHERE stage NOT IN ('Closed Won', 'Closed Lost');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS invoices_paid, COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) AS revenue FROM zoho_invoices WHERE status = 'paid' AND invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_cases FROM zoho_tickets WHERE status IN ('Open', 'Escalated', 'On Hold');

INSERT INTO canonical_scorecard (week, metric_name, value, target, variance, source) VALUES (DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date, 'pipeline_total', $1, NULL, NULL, 'zoho_crm'), (DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date, 'deals_count', $2, NULL, NULL, 'zoho_crm'), (DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date, 'revenue_mtd', $3, NULL, NULL, 'zoho_books'), (DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date, 'open_cases', $4, NULL, NULL, 'zoho_desk');

INSERT INTO canonical_metric (metric_name, value, source) VALUES ('pipeline_total', $1, 'zoho_crm'), ('deals_count', $2, 'zoho_crm'), ('revenue_mtd', $3, 'zoho_books'), ('open_cases', $4, 'zoho_desk');

nodes.name: Post to Rocks Webhook

parameters.query: SELECT rocks, name FROM canonical_quarter WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY year DESC, quarter DESC LIMIT 1;

nodes.notes: Fetch current quarter rocks for the scorecard summary.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('WeeklyScorecardGenerated', 'scorecard', 'n8n', jsonb_build_object('week', DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)::text));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('weekly_scorecard', NOW(), 'ok', 'Scorecard generated') ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Monday 7 AM. Pulls pipeline from Zoho CRM, revenue from Books, cases from Desk. Stores in canonical_scorecard and canonical_metric. From original Phase 1 Build Manual.
